summary: Dark mode testing for Arabic RTL Crowd Services Platform. Tested all dark mode features: toggle, persistence, Forest Night palette, component overrides, session header fix, mobile nav. Fixed 1 bug (SessionHeader gradient leak via CSS addition).

test_results.dark_mode_toggle: PASS - data-testid='theme-toggle' adds 'dark' class to document.documentElement
test_results.toggle_icon: PASS - Shows Moon in light mode, Sun in dark mode
test_results.page_reload_persistence: PASS - dark class persists after page.reload()
test_results.header_background: PASS - rgb(18, 33, 28) = hsl(var(--card)). isDark conditional in Layout.jsx works
test_results.dashboard_cards: PASS - All bg-white elements overridden (0 white leaks), computed rgb(18, 33, 28)
test_results.daily_tabs_bar: PASS - rgb(20, 31, 27) = hsl(160 22% 10%). isDark inline style in DailySessionsPage works
test_results.prayer_sessions_bar: PASS - rgb(20, 31, 27). data-testid CSS override + bg-gradient removal working
test_results.session_header: PASS (FIXED) - rgb(21, 40, 34) brightness=32. Was broken (rgb(236,253,245) brightness=245)
test_results.density_side_panel: PASS - rgb(18, 33, 28). data-testid CSS override applied with !important
test_results.employees_panel: PASS - rgb(18, 33, 28). data-testid CSS override applied with !important
test_results.active_tab_buttons: PASS - rgb(18, 33, 28). .dark .bg-white override catches active tab button
test_results.all_bg_white_overridden: PASS - All 11 .bg-white elements compute as rgb(18, 33, 28), 0 actual white leaks
test_results.light_mode_restored: PASS - Toggle back removes 'dark' class, body returns to rgb(248, 248, 247)
test_results.smooth_transitions: PASS - body transition: 0.25s, 0.2s. Card transition: 0.2s. Matches CSS spec
test_results.shadcn_cards_dark: PASS - Verified via KPI cards computed as hsl(var(--card)) = rgb(18, 33, 28)

bug_fixed.issue: SessionHeader gradient leak - dark:bg-emerald-50 and dark:bg-amber-50 Tailwind dark: variants rendered as light emerald rgb(236,253,245) in dark mode
bug_fixed.root_cause: Tailwind dark: variant generates CSS class 'dark:bg-emerald-50' (selector: .dark .dark\:bg-emerald-50) which is NOT the same as the global override targeting '.dark .bg-emerald-50'. The global CSS in index.css only covers the standalone class 'bg-emerald-50', not the dark: prefix variant.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added 4 CSS rules to index.css: .dark .dark\:bg-emerald-50, .dark .dark\:bg-amber-50, .dark .dark\:border-emerald-200\/20, .dark .dark\:border-amber-200\/20 with !important to override Tailwind generated styles
bug_fixed.verification: Session header bg changed from rgb(236, 253, 245) (brightness=245) to rgb(21, 40, 34) (brightness=32)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SessionHeader.jsx used dark:bg-emerald-50 / dark:bg-amber-50 which generated Tailwind dark variant CSS that wasn't caught by global overrides. Fixed in index.css.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode fully functional with Forest Night palette. All components tested. Session header fix applied to index.css (dark: variant CSS overrides). data-testid='theme-toggle' works. dark class on documentElement triggers all ~80 CSS overrides. Mobile bottom nav (data-testid='mobile-bottom-nav') also properly dark. Light mode perfectly restored on toggle.

rca_of_issue.bug: SessionHeader gradient leak in dark mode
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Enable dark mode. 2. Navigate to daily-sessions. 3. Click a session. 4. Observe the session header box has bright mint-green (rgb(236,253,245)) background.
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Tailwind dark:bg-emerald-50 generates .dark .dark\:bg-emerald-50{background-color:rgb(236 253 245)} which applies LIGHT emerald when dark mode is active. The global override in index.css .dark .bg-emerald-50{...} only matches the class 'bg-emerald-50', NOT the Tailwind variant class 'dark:bg-emerald-50' (different CSS class name).
rca_of_issue.fix: Added to index.css: .dark .dark\:bg-emerald-50 { background-color: hsl(160 30% 12%) !important; } and corresponding amber rule
